html:
{{ doc.warning_level }}

Reference: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.utils.today()) }}

To:
{{ doc.employee_name }}
{{ doc.designation }}
Employee ID: {{ doc.employee }}

Subject: {{ doc.warning_level }}

Dear {{ doc.employee_name }},

This letter serves as a formal {{ doc.warning_level }} regarding the incident that occurred on {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.date_of_offense) }}.

Details:

{{ doc.description }}
{% if doc.warning_level == "Final Warning" %}

This is your FINAL WARNING. Any further violations may result in termination.

{% elif doc.warning_level == "Summary Dismissal" %}

This offense may lead to immediate termination of employment.

{% endif %}

We trust that you will take this matter seriously.

Sincerely,
name: Disciplinary Letter
